title: Data Warehouse Management and Control Component Flow
description: This flowchart illustrates the key management and control processes, their components, and their interdependencies within a data warehousing environment.
relationships: The Administrator configures the System and Security Managers, which provide rules to the Data Acquisition Manager. The Data Acquisition Manager processes data and logs metadata to the Metadata Repository. The Workflow Monitor uses the Metadata Repository to track ETL jobs and report status back to the Administrator.
